ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plots" (
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plot */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the plot */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of crop planted in the plot */,
  "planting_date" TEXT /* Date the crop was planted */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date the crop was harvested */,
  "research_project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project the plot belongs to */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the plot */,
  "irrigation_method" TEXT /* Method of irrigation used in the plot */,
  "fertilizer_type" TEXT /* Type of fertilizer used in the plot */,
  "last_fertilization_date" TEXT /* Date of the last fertilization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plots_research_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* List of collaborators or other research teams involved in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plot where the observation was made */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the observation */,
  "plant_height" TEXT /* Height of the plant in cm */,
  "plant_health" TEXT /* Health condition of the plant (e.g., good, bad, moderate) */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer who made the observation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the observation */,
  "leaf_color" TEXT /* Color of the leaves */,
  "stem_diameter" TEXT /* Diameter of the stem in cm */,
  "flower_count" INTEGER /* Number of flowers on the plant */,
  "fruit_count" INTEGER /* Number of fruits on the plant */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES observers ("observer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_plant_health FOREIGN KEY ("plant_health") REFERENCES plant_health_types ("health_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "observers" (
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observer */,
  "observer_name" TEXT /* Name of the observer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the observer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the observer (e.g., researcher, field worker, assistant) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the observer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the observer belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the observer joined the research institute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_health_types" (
  "health_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant health type */,
  "health_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant health type (e.g., good, bad, moderate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plant health type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bad_plant_observations" (
  "bad_plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bad plant observation */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation that triggered the bad plant record */,
  "disease_type" TEXT /* Type of disease affecting the plant */,
  "disease_symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms of the disease */,
  "treatment_applied" TEXT /* Treatment applied to the plant */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the disease */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Status of the plant recovery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bad_plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bad_plant_observations_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bad_plant_observations_disease_type FOREIGN KEY ("disease_type") REFERENCES disease_types ("disease_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bad_plant_observations_treatment_applied FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_applied") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_types" (
  "disease_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease type */,
  "disease_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease type (e.g., Fungal infection, Bacterial infection) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment (e.g., Fungicide spray, Antibiotic treatment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "application_method" TEXT /* Method of application (e.g., spray, soil application) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment application */,
  "efficacy_rate" TEXT /* Efficacy rate of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the research institute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation the note is related to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)
